items.name: Gemini Dynamics C&U HUD (Orange)
items.description: The Gemini Dynamics C&U "Neptune" HUD was developed in 2055 to assist the first ever Consciousness Consortium with field operations in East Asia. The "Neptune" contains a multitude of sensors, which have been condensed into one single unit, located on the side of the device. These sensors enable the user to enable a thermal overlay, along with a crosshair using an integrated ballistics computer. The "Neptune" remains in use to this day by Arm of Genesis foot soldiers & command staff.
